content.text: {"similarities":[{"id":"wtc1f19","score":88,"reason":"Adjacent WTC fugue, same composer, diatonic modulations, PAC/HC cadences"},{"id":"wtc1f24","score":82,"reason":"Same WTC book, Bach fugue, minor key, shared cadence types"},{"id":"beet-path","score":45,"reason":"Minor key, modal mixture, PAC/IAC cadences, dramatic character"},{"id":"beet-moon","score":38,"reason":"Minor key, IAC cadences, introspective Baroque-influenced texture"},{"id":"brahms-bal","score":35,"reason":"Minor key, modal mixture, IAC and PAC cadences present"},{"id":"chopin-n72","score":28,"reason":"Minor key, modal mixture common, Romantic vs Baroque contrast"},{"id":"schub-op90","score":15,"reason":"Major key, Romantic, some modal mixture but distant style"},{"id":"brahms-w1","score":10,"reason":"Major key, Romantic waltz, minimal shared characteristics"},{"id":"mozart-k331","score":18,"reason":"Classical era, diatonic modulations, but major key theme"}],"corpus_by_cadences":[{"cadence_type":"PAC","pieces":["wtc1f19","wtc1f24","beet-path","beet-moon","mozart-k331"]},{"cadence_type":"IAC","pieces":["wtc1f24","beet-path","beet-moon","brahms-bal","chopin-n72"]},{"cadence_type":"HC","pieces":["wtc1f19","wtc1f24","beet-path","mozart-k331","brahms-bal"]}],"corpus_by_modulations":[{"modulation_type":"diatonic","pieces":["wtc1f19","wtc1f24","mozart-k331","beet-moon","beet-path"]},{"modulation_type":"modal_mixture","pieces":["beet-path","beet-moon","brahms-bal","chopin-n72","schub-op90"]}],"corpus_by_tags":[{"tag":"Baroque","pieces":["wtc1f19","wtc1f24"]},{"tag":"minor_key","pieces":["wtc1f24","chopin-n72","brahms-bal","beet-moon","beet-path"]},{"tag":"Romantic","pieces":["chopin-n72","schub-op90","brahms-bal","brahms-w1"]},{"tag":"Classical","pieces":["beet-moon","beet-path","mozart-k331"]},{"tag":"fugue","pieces":["wtc1f19","wtc1f24"]}]}
